channel.title: Products on Createwith
channel.description: Recent content in Products on Createwith

item.title: Glød Pendant
item.description:
A turned walnut shade, hand-fitted with a solid brass suspension ring and canopy. The shade diffuses light downward in a warm, focused cone — designed for dining tables, kitchen islands, and reading nooks. The walnut is left uncoated, so it deepens in colour with time and handling.

The suspension ring and canopy are turned from solid brass and will patinate naturally over time. All metal components are available as spare parts. Cable length can be adjusted at the time of order.

item.title: Glød Wall
item.description:
The wall-mounted sibling to the pendant. The same turned walnut form, a brass wall plate, and an adjustable arm that lets you direct the light where it is needed. Works beautifully beside a bed, above a shelf, or in a hallway.

The wall plate is solid brass and is fixed with concealed fittings. The arm is jointed so the cone of light can be adjusted. The cable can be routed along the wall surface or concealed within the wall on request.

item.title: Desk Object
item.description:
A small sculptural object for the working surface. Solid walnut with a precision brass inlay. It does not hold pens or papers — it holds a moment of quiet in a busy desk. The kind of thing that improves every room it enters.

The object is turned and hand-polished from a single piece of walnut. The brass inlay is precision-milled and pressed in without adhesive. The base is lined with untreated suede leather to protect the working surface.

item.title: Plant Object
item.description:
A turned walnut vessel for small plants, succulents, and dried botanicals. The form is quiet and rounded — it gives the plant space to be noticed. The natural oils from walnut provide a mild protection without lacquer or treatment.

The interior is treated with linseed oil to tolerate light moisture from pots. The base is flat and stable. Available in two sizes: small (suitable for 6 cm pots) and medium (suitable for 10 cm pots). Size is specified at the time of order.
